title: AI Agent Instructions for mizerAgents

text: Indentation: 4 spaces Naming: camelCase snake_case functions; PascalCase classes Language: British English (en-GB)

title: AI Agent Instructions for mizerAgents
text: Run devtools::document() editing roxygen2 comments. Update NEWS.md adding features fixing bugs.

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: AI coding agents can surprisingly effective helping build, calibrate, analyse extend mizer models. Unlike web search static manual, agent can read actual data scripts, suggest specific parameter changes, write R snippets situation, explain functions plain language. article explains get agent working inside RStudio shows range example tasks one can save significant time.

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: mizerAgents bundles everything AI agent needs understand mizer API. need run R project: creates four files working directory: MIZER-AGENTS.md — concise mizer reference: core workflow, key object descriptions, species parameter table, path full local API documentation. file package-managed can updated mizer upgraded. AGENTS.md — project-specific instruction file initially created @MIZER-AGENTS.md shim line start. CLAUDE.md GEMINI.md — one-line shims containing @AGENTS.md, agent-specific tools look named file also pick shared context. MIZER-AGENTS.md always updated run setup_mizer_agent(), AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md created already exist (preserving custom project notes shims).

what: Running an AI agent in the terminal
title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: Terminal tab RStudio (open Tools → Terminal → New Terminal) runs real shell project directory. AI coding agents can run alongside normal R session can read edit files. Alternatively, may want open terminal separate window RStudio window, example work multiple monitors. start agent working directory project.

what: What an AI agent can help with
title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: Building model — translating species parameter spreadsheet working newMultispeciesParams() call, identifying missing columns suggesting sensible defaults. Calibration — diagnosing species converging steady(), suggesting parameters adjust biomasses . Writing analysis code — producing R code compare scenarios, extract rates, reshape output plotting. Explaining functions — describing function use , especially less familiar parts API setRateFunction() setComponent(). Extending mizer — scaffolding custom rate function new ecosystem component. Debugging — reading error message suspicious plot alongside code suggesting fixes. agent infallible. Always verify R code produces actually runs gives sensible results, especially anything involving numerical tuning.

what: Giving the agent context about your project
title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: running setup_mizer_agent() AGENTS.md project directory. begins line @MIZER-AGENTS.md, shims mizer package reference. Open AGENTS.md add short description project . example: project-specific context costs ten minutes write saves re-explaining setup start every session.
code: @MIZER-AGENTS.md  # Celtic Sea mizer model  This project builds and analyses a mizer model for the Celtic Sea, calibrated to ICES survey data for 2010–2020.  ## Species Cod, Haddock, Whiting, Herring, Sprat, Mackerel — 6 species.  ## Key files - `species_params.csv` — species parameter table - `celtic_model.R` — builds and saves the MizerParams object - `scenarios.R` — runs and compares fishing scenarios  ## Workflow 1. Build: `celtic_model.R`, saves `celtic_params.rds` 2. Load: `params <- readRDS("celtic_params.rds")` 3. Project and analyse in `scenarios.R`

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: examples illustrate kinds request work well. Type directly agent’s terminal session, browser-based AI assistant.

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: “CSV species parameters Celtic Sea data/celtic_species_params.csv. Read help set mizer model. Tell required columns missing sensible defaults use.” agent inspect file, identify missing columns w_max beta, suggest defaults, produce newMultispeciesParams() call ready run.

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: “’ve run steady(params) biomass Whiting 4× high compared biomass_observed column. ’s likely cause try first?” good response walk relevant parameters (gamma, beta, sigma, z0) suggest targeted changes rather blind adjustments.

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: “Write R code runs three fishing scenarios — status quo, 50% effort reduction, effort doubled — 50 years , plots yield time three axes legend.” agent produce self-contained snippet using project() plotYield(). Check , run , ask tweaks.

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: “setBevertonHolt() actually ? ’m confused reproduction_level argument change calibration.” get plain-language explanation Beverton-Holt stock–recruitment relationship mizer, reproduction_level represents ecologically, guidance adjust .

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: “want growth rates scale water temperature following Q10 relationship. Show use setRateFunction() replace encounter rate params@other_params$temp used.” agent produce custom encounter function setRateFunction() call register — kind task otherwise require careful reading extending mizer article.

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: “Running project(params, t_max = 50) throws warning repeatedly: [paste warning text]. mean fix ?” Share exact text warning. agent usually identify cause (e.g. species going near-extinct, numerical instability large time step) suggest remedy.

title: Using AI Agents with Mizer
text: specific. “model doesn’t work” hard help . “Cod biomass 10× high steady() ’ve already tried reducing gamma” much easier. Share actual files. CLI agents can read .rds files, CSVs R scripts. Give real data produce targeted suggestions rather generic advice. Iterate. first response misses mark, say explain expected. Agents improve substantially clarifying feedback within session. Verify numerical results. agent knows mizer API well may know whether particular parameter value ecologically plausible system. Apply domain knowledge. Teach agent explain something agent make agent’s answers useful , tell agent “Add just told AGENTS.md know future sessions.” Keep sessions focused. One task per session tends produce better results long chain unrelated questions.

title: mizerAgents 0.0.0.9000
text: setup_mizer_agent() creates updates agent context files (MIZER-AGENTS.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md) mizer project directory AI coding agents pick mizer reference card API documentation automatically startup. Bundled inst/AGENTS.md — concise mizer reference card covering core workflow, key objects, species parameters, plotting, extending mizer. Bundled inst/llms.txt — concise index full mizer API, links online reference pages. Bundled inst/llms-full.txt — full prose documentation every exported mizer function, intended agent grep searches.
